sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id Int32, event_date Date, event_datetime DateTime) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_dates VALUES (1, toDate('2023-10-01'), toDateTime('2023-10-01 12:00:00'));
SELECT id, toString(event_datetime, 'UTC') AS formatted_datetime FROM test_dates WHERE event_date = toDate('2023-10-01');
UPDATE test_dates SET event_datetime = toDateTime(toString(event_date) || ' 14:00:00') WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, toString(event_date) AS date_string FROM test_dates WHERE event_date < toDate('2023-10-02');
